text:
On Tue, 12 Sep 2006 20:11:00 +0800
Volker Stolz <vs@FreeBSD.org> mentioned:

> Dear maintainer, please look into this issue! - Volker
> 
> 
> 
> 

How this happen you have no libblas.so installed? you should
reinstall math/blas port.

The blas installs the following libs:
libblas.a      libblas.so.1   libblas.so@


Your installations seems to be corrupt.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov         MBSD labs, Inc.         <ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru>
